title: Swaddle Your Baby Like a Pro: Pediatrician Tips
description:
There are few tools as helpful to have in the new-parent tool kit than knowing how to swaddle your baby. This week Doctor Kurt Bjorkman, a board certified pediatrician and now dad of 3, shares some common swaddle techniques with 4 popular baby swaddles. He also discusses the key things you need to know to keep your baby safe during sleep! 

Looking for more?!

Coming in 2026, we are launching TDB+. It’s a research-backed membership designed to give you support, connection, and resources for wherever you’re at on your parenting journey! 

Imagine in-depth access to pregnancy, birth, and parenting content, while also getting behind the scenes interaction with us, our day-to-day real lives, and a community of other parents to support you.

Learn more about the membership and join the waitlist here! 👉 https://forms.gle/BxXToaDdKooWgfPr5

Affiliate links to all products mentioned in video here: https://www.thedoctorsbjorkman.com/products 

**Weekly updates on Wednesdays! We are covering everything from TTC, infertility, prenatal care, labor and delivery, best baby gear, your baby's week by week development, postpartum concerns, and other tips and tricks for pregnancy and new parents! 

Special resources for this weeks video:
https://www.healthychildren.org/English/ages-stages/baby/diapers-clothing/Pages/Swaddling-Is-it-Safe.aspx?_gl=1*1nvz2yp*_ga*MjAwODA1NjQyMi4xNzI4OTY0OTAz*_ga_FD9D3XZVQQ*MTc0MTUxMDMwMy4yLjAuMTc0MTUxMDMwMy4wLjAuMA..

Intro Music: A WAY FOR ME - Nicolai Heidlas by Chem Ocampo 

Keywords: pregnancy update, the doctors bjorkman, fourth trimester pregnancy, pregnancy vlog, new parents, newborn sleep, parenting tips, safe sleep, swaddle, baby, sleep
